message:
fix: guard notification-verified localStorage write against quota errors (#8897)

setBrowserNotifVerified() called bare localStorage.setItem with no try/catch.
On QuotaExceededError (storage full), SecurityError (private browsing with
storage disabled), or other browser storage policies, the call would throw
uncaught — crashing the click handler — or, when wrapped silently elsewhere,
appear to succeed while the value evaporated on reload. Either way the user
sees their "verified" choice silently revert next time the page loads.

Wrap the write in try/catch, log a warning so the failure is observable in
support/dev tooling, and return a boolean so future callers can react. Keep
the change additive: existing call sites continue to work unchanged because
they ignore the return value (they were already treating the call as
fire-and-forget).

Add tests covering the new failure path: spy on window.localStorage.setItem,
make it throw QuotaExceededError, and assert the helper returns false and
logs a warning instead of propagating the exception.

Fixes #8866

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach} from 'vitest'
+import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach, vi, afterEach } from 'vitest'
 import { isBrowserNotifVerified, setBrowserNotifVerified } from '../notificationStatus'
 
 describe('isBrowserNotifVerified', () => {
@@ -46,4 +46,36 @@ describe('setBrowserNotifVerified', () => {
     expect(stored.verified).toBe(true)
     expect(typeof stored.at).toBe('number')
   })
+
+  it('returns true when persistence succeeds', () => {
+    expect(setBrowserNotifVerified(true)).toBe(true)
+  })
+
+  describe('when localStorage.setItem throws (#8866)', () => {
+    let setItemSpy: ReturnType<typeof vi.spyOn>
+    let warnSpy: ReturnType<typeof vi.spyOn>
+
+    beforeEach(() => {
+      setItemSpy = vi.spyOn(window.localStorage, 'setItem').mockImplementation(() => {
+        // Simulate browser quota / private-browsing failure mode
+        throw new DOMException('quota exceeded', 'QuotaExceededError')
+      })
+      warnSpy = vi.spyOn(console, 'warn').mockImplementation(() => {})
+    })
+
+    afterEach(() => {
+      setItemSpy.mockRestore()
+      warnSpy.mockRestore()
+    })
+
+    it('returns false instead of throwing', () => {
+      expect(() => setBrowserNotifVerified(true)).not.toThrow()
+      expect(setBrowserNotifVerified(true)).toBe(false)
+    })
+
+    it('logs a warning so the failure is observable', () => {
+      setBrowserNotifVerified(true)
+      expect(warnSpy).toHaveBeenCalled()
+    })
+  })
 })
